mapper.select: SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID AS id, '#' || r.RESERVATION_ID AS resId, m.USERNAME AS username, rm.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS duration, '₩ ' || TO_CHAR(r.AMOUNT, 'FM999,999,999') AS totalPrice, r.STATUS AS statusText, CASE WHEN r.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN 'badge-done' WHEN r.STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN 'badge-danger' ELSE 'badge-wait' END AS statusClass FROM RESERVATION r JOIN MEMBER1 m ON m.MEMBER_ID = r.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM rm ON rm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID ORDER BY r.RESERVATION_ID DESC

SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID AS id, '#' || r.RESERVATION_ID AS resId, rm.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') || ' ~ ' || TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS duration, '₩ ' || TO_CHAR(r.AMOUNT, 'FM999,999,999') AS totalPrice, r.STATUS AS statusText, CASE WHEN r.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' THEN 'badge-done' WHEN r.STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN 'badge-danger' ELSE 'badge-wait' END AS statusClass FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN ROOM rm ON rm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID WHERE r.MEMBER_ID = #{memberId} ORDER BY r.RESERVATION_ID DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID AS reservationId, od.ORDER_ID AS orderId, m.USERNAME AS memberName, pl.PLACE_NAME AS placeName, rm.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, pt.PARTNER_NAME AS partnerName, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkInDate, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkOutDate, r.AMOUNT AS amount, NVL(od_refund.AMOUNT, 0) AS refundAmount, r.STATUS AS status, o.STATUS AS paymentStatus, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY r.RESERVATION_ID DESC) AS rn FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN MEMBER1 m ON m.MEMBER_ID = r.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM rm ON rm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE pl ON pl.PLACE_ID = rm.PLACE_ID LEFT JOIN PARTNER pt ON pt.PARTNER_ID = r.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RESERVATION_ID, ORDER_ID FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE DETAIL_ID IN ( SELECT MIN(DETAIL_ID) FROM ORDER_DETAIL GROUP BY RESERVATION_ID ) ) od ON od.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID LEFT JOIN ORDERS o ON o.ORDER_ID = od.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od_refund ON od_refund.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID AND od_refund.STATUS = 'CANCELLED'
) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{size}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN MEMBER1 m ON m.MEMBER_ID = r.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM rm ON rm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE pl ON pl.PLACE_ID = rm.PLACE_ID LEFT JOIN PARTNER pt ON pt.PARTNER_ID = r.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RESERVATION_ID, ORDER_ID FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE DETAIL_ID IN ( SELECT MIN(DETAIL_ID) FROM ORDER_DETAIL GROUP BY RESERVATION_ID ) ) od ON od.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID LEFT JOIN ORDERS o ON o.ORDER_ID = od.ORDER_ID

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND r.CHECK_OUT_DATE >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS reservedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.STATUS = 'SUCCESS' AND r.CHECK_OUT_DATE < TRUNC(SYSDATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS usedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN r.STATUS = 'CANCELED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelledCount FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN MEMBER1 m ON m.MEMBER_ID = r.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM rm ON rm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE pl ON pl.PLACE_ID = rm.PLACE_ID LEFT JOIN PARTNER pt ON pt.PARTNER_ID = r.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RESERVATION_ID, ORDER_ID FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE DETAIL_ID IN ( SELECT MIN(DETAIL_ID) FROM ORDER_DETAIL GROUP BY RESERVATION_ID ) ) od ON od.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID LEFT JOIN ORDERS o ON o.ORDER_ID = od.ORDER_ID

SELECT r.RESERVATION_ID AS reservationId, od.ORDER_ID AS orderId, m.USERNAME AS memberName, pl.PLACE_NAME AS placeName, rm.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, pt.PARTNER_NAME AS partnerName, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_IN_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkInDate, TO_CHAR(r.CHECK_OUT_DATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkOutDate, r.GUEST_COUNT AS guestCount, r.REQUEST AS request, r.AMOUNT AS amount, NVL(od_refund.AMOUNT, 0) AS refundAmount, o.COUPON_DISCOUNT AS couponDiscount, o.POINT_DISCOUNT AS pointDiscount, o.REAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT AS settlementTargetAmount, r.COMMISSION_RATE AS commissionRate, r.STATUS AS status, o.STATUS AS paymentStatus FROM RESERVATION r LEFT JOIN MEMBER1 m ON m.MEMBER_ID = r.MEMBER_ID LEFT JOIN ROOM rm ON rm.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID LEFT JOIN PLACE pl ON pl.PLACE_ID = rm.PLACE_ID LEFT JOIN PARTNER pt ON pt.PARTNER_ID = r.PARTNER_ID LEFT JOIN ( SELECT RESERVATION_ID, ORDER_ID FROM ORDER_DETAIL WHERE DETAIL_ID IN ( SELECT MIN(DETAIL_ID) FROM ORDER_DETAIL GROUP BY RESERVATION_ID ) ) od ON od.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID LEFT JOIN ORDERS o ON o.ORDER_ID = od.ORDER_ID LEFT JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od_refund ON od_refund.RESERVATION_ID = r.RESERVATION_ID AND od_refund.STATUS = 'CANCELLED' WHERE r.RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId}

SELECT c.COUPON_NAME AS couponName, c.DISCOUNT_TYPE AS discountType, cu.DISCOUNT_AMOUNT AS discountAmount, cu.PLATFORM_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT AS platformDiscountAmount, cu.PARTNER_DISCOUNT_AMOUNT AS partnerDiscountAmount, c.PLATFORM_SHARE AS platformShare, c.PARTNER_SHARE AS partnerShare FROM COUPON_USAGE cu JOIN MEMBER_COUPON mc ON mc.MEMBER_COUPON_ID = cu.MEMBER_COUPON_ID JOIN COUPON c ON c.COUPON_ID = mc.COUPON_ID JOIN ORDER_DETAIL od ON od.ORDER_ID = cu.ORDER_ID WHERE od.RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId} AND cu.STATUS != 'canceled'
mapper.update: UPDATE RESERVATION SET STATUS = #{status} WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{id}
UPDATE RESERVATION SET STATUS = #{status} WHERE RESERVATION_ID = #{reservationId}
